name: @aipehub/im-qq
description: AipeHub IM bridge for QQ via the OFFICIAL Bot API (bot.q.qq.com) — implements ImBridge over the sanctioned HTTP webhook + Ed25519 callback validation. AppID/ClientSecret bot; no SDK dep (fetch + node:crypto). Inbound webhook needs a public domain + TLS (reverse proxy). Group/C2C are passive-reply only — no proactive push.
